---
title: "About"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This site documents the species-selection and inventory pipeline behind
**CryoZoo**, a biobank of live Tetrapod (mammal and bird) cell lines profiled
with a diverse set of genomics methods.

The pipeline cleans and joins the master species list with several inventory
sources (cryotube stocks, cell culture outcomes, nucleic-acid extractions,
and sequencing status), summarises the resulting collection against IUCN
status, genome availability, and TOGA annotation coverage, and places
selected species on time-calibrated mammal and bird phylogenies.

For a script-by-script description of each analysis and how they depend on
one another, see [analysis/README.md](https://github.com/lewange/cryozoo-overview/blob/master/analysis/README.md)
in the source repository, or start browsing from the [Home](index.html) page.
